response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep hands-on work with event-driven systems, and notable open-source contributions including an agentic workflow tool (MCP), but lacks clear evidence of leading a team at scale, designing multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments, or owning architectural decisions for real-time credit/risk systems — key requirements for a CTO role.
strengths: Proven experience building event-driven, scalable systems with real-time data (Dlang, Node.js, microservices)
Hands-on contribution to agentic AI infrastructure (MCP frameworks) and open-source tooling
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, OSS projects, and cross-functional contributions
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10+ to 30+ people or developing senior technical leaders
Lacks documented production experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulated financial AI systems
No clear track record of architecting model-agnostic, auditable multi-agent frameworks with feedback loops for financial decisioning
